Enterprise software +3.73% pre-market. AI CRM demand narrative. Above VWAP. Break above $160 = measured move to $169.

putSetups.rationale: Memory chip sector rotation -5.93% pre-market. Below VWAP. Semiconductor weakness on AI capex pause fears. Break below $1080 = continuation to $1030.
